name: Reeses Chewy Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar in a large mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs and vanilla; beat well.
3. Combine flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt; gradually blend into the creamed mixture.
4. Stir in peanut butter chips.
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 9 minutes. Do not overbake.
7. Cookies will be soft; they will puff during baking and flatten upon cooling.
8. Cool until set, about 1 minute.
9. Remove from the cookie sheet; cool completely on a wire rack.
